name: Puigcerda Station-Side N-260 Approach
roadSegment: N-260/N-152 approach near Puigcerda station side; exact race-line side needs verification
estimatedPassageTime: Around 15:52 / 16:02 / 16:14 local by proximity to official N-260 Puigcerda point
summary: Practical town-edge fallback near rail/station-side access, but the exact race-line and spectator side need local confirmation.
whyItMatters: This could be easier for a group based in Puigcerda than fighting for a junction spot, while staying close to the official N-260 schedule point.

access.estimated_route_from_base: Walk from Puigcerda lodging or station area before closures; exact path depends on course barriers.
access.parking_transit_possibilities: Rail station area exists in normal conditions; parking and station access during closures unknown.
access.walk_bike_approach_notes: Useful only if the group can remain on the correct side of the N-260 without crossing the active course.
access.road_closure_notes: Unknown; requires official local traffic plan.

pros: Close to the official N-260 Puigcerda timing landmark.
Station-side town access may reduce the need to drive.
Potential fallback if the main junction is too crowded or restricted.
cons: Exact race line relative to this coordinate must be verified from official GIS/map before selection.
May have lower atmosphere and sightline quality than the named N-260 junction.
Could be blocked by barriers or railway/road fencing.

logistics.parking: Unknown; station-area parking may be unavailable or unreachable during closures.
logistics.transit: Puigcerda station is on the R3/Ripoll-Puigcerda line in normal service, but event-day usefulness is unknown.

crowdRisk: medium-low: likely less crowded than the main junction, but uncertainty is higher.
bathroomFoodProximity: Unknown on race day; station/town facilities may exist in normal conditions but are not confirmed accessible.
escapeRoute: Return on foot toward station/town on the same side of the route after convoy clearance.
safetyAssessment: Reject if the only viewing space is a shoulder, traffic island, railway edge, or requires crossing the route after closure.

timing.best_arrival_window: 3 hours before passage, adjusted once closure times are published.
timing.race_day_risk: Medium-high because exact standing feasibility is not sourced.
